description: Histogram showing the distribution of 2023 School Performance Grade scores across about 2,280 North Carolina schools — where schools cluster and how scores spread. Bins touch because the score scale is continuous.

title.subtitle: A histogram shows the shape of one numeric variable — where schools cluster and how they spread.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
